analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that President Putin will not attend the UN General Assembly in person due to unstable epidemiological conditions in the US and will address the session via video. Evaluation against narratives: RU1 (West immoral/hostile/decadent): The tweet mentions US epidemiological instability but does not frame the US as immoral, hostile, or decadent—it's a neutral logistical/health justification. Not promoted. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): No mention of alternative systems, multilateral leadership, or non-Western cooperation. Not promoted. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): No claims about benevolence, peace, or partnership. Not promoted. RU4 (Russian history admirable): No historical content. Not promoted. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No boasting of achievements or superiority. Not promoted. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet is informational and does not promote any listed narratives.
